table.style: width:100%; max-width:780px; margin:0 auto; border-collapse:collapse; border-radius:10px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(194,24,91,0.18), 0 2px 0 #C2185B;

img.style: height:60px; display:block; filter:brightness(0) invert(1) drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,255,255,0.4));

div.style: color:#FFD6E8; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:0.6rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:2px;
color:#ffffff; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase;

img.style: height:72px; width:72px; object-fit:contain; display:block; margin-left:auto; border-radius:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:3px;

td.t-att-style: 'width:260px; min-width:260px; vertical-align:top; padding:0; background:#FFF0F5; border-left:5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#C2185B') + ';'

img.t-att-style: 'width:255px; height:340px; object-fit:cover; object-position:top center; display:block; border-top:5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#C2185B') + '; border-bottom:5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#C2185B') + ';'

div.style: position:absolute; top:12px; right:14px; width:64px; height:64px; border-radius:50%; background:#C2185B; transform:rotate(-10deg); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #F8BBD9, 0 0 0 6px #C2185B, 0 6px 20px rgba(194,24,91,0.4); text-align:center; line-height:64px;

span.style: color:#ffffff; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:1.7rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-1px; vertical-align:middle;

div.style: font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:1.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#1a0a12; line-height:1.1; margin-bottom:2px; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase;
font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#C2185B; margin-bottom:10px;

span.t-att-style: 'background:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#C2185B') + '20; color:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#C2185B') + '; border:1.5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#C2185B') + '80; padding:4px 16px; border-radius:20px; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase;'

td.style: color:#C2185B; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;
color:#1a0a12; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;

color:#C2185B; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;
color:#1a0a12; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;

color:#C2185B; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;
color:#e53935; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;

color:#C2185B; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;
color:#1a0a12; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;

color:#C2185B; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;
color:#1a0a12; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #FCE4EC; vertical-align:middle;
color:#C2185B; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; vertical-align:middle;

span.style: color:#FFD6E8; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase;
